para_trans: Mahatma Gandhi National Rural Employment Guarantee Scheme - Maharashtra, Nagpur Commissionerate, Divisional Commissioner / Collector / Zilla Parishad / Taluk Office on extension of temporary posts.
Government of Maharashtra
the Planning Department
Government Decision HATH: Establishment-2025 / No.44 / Magro-3
16 OT Floor, New Administration Building,
Martyr Rajguru Chowk, Madam Cama Marg,
Mantralaya, Mumbai - 400 032.
Date: 9th March, 2026

Read: - 1) Planning Department Government Decision No: Establishment-2016 / Q. No.29 / Magro-3, D. 28.12.2022 2) Planning Department Government Decision No: Establishment-2023 / Q.No.06 / MagroRo-3, D. 26.09.2024.

3) Finance Department Government Decision No: Post-2016 / Q. 8/16 APC, D. 03.03.2025 4) Planning Department Government Decision No: Establishment-2025 / Q. No.44 / Magro-3, D. 20.03.2025 5) Planning Department Government Decision No: Establishment-2025 / Q. No.44 / Magro-3, D. 19.09.2025 6) Finance Department Government Decision No.: Designation-2016 / Q. 8/16 APC, D. 28.02.2026

Preamble: - For the effective implementation of Mahatma Gandhi National Rural Employment Guarantee Scheme, the Government vide Decision No. Astap-2016 / Q. No.29 / MGNREGA-3, dated 28.12.2022 has approved the revised structure of a total of 1019 posts in Divisional Commissioner, Collector, Zilla Parishad, Taluka Level B Mahatma Gandhi National Rural Employment Guarantee Scheme-Maharashtra Commissionerate with a total of 886 regular posts and 133 contractual posts. As a result, a total of 886 regular posts of Mahatma Gandhi National Rural Employment Guarantee Scheme-Maharashtra Commissionerate, Nagpur-18, Divisional Commissioner-75, Collector-270, Zilla Parishad-170 and 353 at Taluka level are under consideration of the Government for extension beyond the date 01.03.2026.

Government Decision: - In pursuance of the powers conferred by the Government Decision No. Designation-2016 / Q. No. 8/16 APC, dated 28th February, 2026 on the Administrative Departments of the Ministry of Finance regarding extension of temporary posts in their subordinate offices, this Government Decision provides for creation of 18 posts for the Commissionerate of Mahatma Gandhi National Rural Employment Guarantee Scheme-Maharashtra, Nagpur under the Employment Guarantee Scheme, out of the total number of COR posts functioning in the Divisional Commissioner, Collector, Zilla Parishad and Taluk level offices. 01.03.2026 that is. Government approval is being given to extend the deadline up to 31.08.2026. The details of these posts are at Annexure No. 1 to 5 is shown.
Government Decision Number: Establishment-2025 / P.S. 4 / Magro-3
Out of the sanctioned posts, posts lying vacant for more than six months shall be excluded.
Expenditure demand on regular posts appointed by the above deputation 01 - Pay No.
O-3, Head of Accounts-2505, Rural Employment-60 Other Programs-01 Employment Guarantee Scheme-
Five Year Plan - (01) (01) Employment Guarantee Scheme (2505 0022) and by Appropriation
Manpower 10- Contractual, No.O-3, Head of Accounts-2505, Rural Employment-60 Other Programs- 001 Employment Guarantee Scheme- Five Year Plan- (01) (01) Employment Guarantee Scheme
(2505 0022) This headings should be subtracted from the grants approved for the year 2025-26.
4. This Government Decision, Finance Department Government Decision Designation-2016 / Q. 8/16 Aapuk, Dated
In exercise of the powers conferred on the Administrative Department under the 28.02.2026
is being released.
5. This Government Decision is available on the Government of Maharashtra website www.maharashtra.gov.in.
